Now I have a clear picture. I see that:

1. **XgtProtocol.cs** - Already supports U area address conversion (line 56-84). `%UW0.9.1` -> `%UB0.9.2` is already implemented.
2. **XgtClient.cs** - `ReadWordsAsync`/`WriteWordsAsync` already accept any address string, including `%UW0.9.1`. The protocol conversion happens in `XgtProtocol.BuildReadRequest/BuildWriteRequest`.
3. **ServoControlViewModel.cs** - Already has full JOG/Home/Move/Stop/Reset functionality with UW reads.
4. **ServoTestWindow.xaml** - Already has the complete servo control panel UI.

So the ServoTest feature already exists as a separate window. The task is to integrate servo control into the IoMonitorWindow. Let me now implement the changes.

Since XgtProtocol.cs and XgtClient.cs already support U area addressing (the ServoControlViewModel already calls `_client.WriteWordsAsync("%UW0.9.1", ...)` and `_client.ReadWordsAsync("%UW0.9.0", 2)`), I only need to:

1. Add JOG/servo commands and UW polling to **IoMonitorViewModel.cs**
2. Add servo control panel to **IoMonitorWindow.xaml**
3. Add button handlers to **IoMonitorWindow.xaml.cs**

Let me implement all three changes.

                                        Background="#C62828" Foreground="White" BorderThickness="0"
                                        FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="10"/>
                                <Button Content="리셋" Margin="1" Click="BtnReset_Click"
                                        Background="#E65100" Foreground="White" BorderThickness="0"
                                        FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="10"/>
                            </UniformGrid>

                            <!-- JOG 버튼 (누르는 동안 동작) -->
                            <Grid Height="36">
                                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                <Button Grid.Column="0" Content="◀ JOG CCW" Margin="1"
                                        Background="#37474F" Foreground="White" BorderThickness="0"
                                        FontSize="11" FontWeight="Bold"
                                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown="BtnJogCcw_Down"
                                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCcw_Up"/>
                                <Button Grid.Column="1" Content="JOG CW ▶" Margin="1"
                                        Background="#37474F" Foreground="White" BorderThickness="0"
                                        FontSize="11" FontWeight="Bold"
                                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown="BtnJogCw_Down"
                                        PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="BtnJogCw_Up"/>
                            </Grid>

                            <!-- 슬롯9 U영역 상태 + 마지막 명령 -->
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,4,0,0">
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Uw090Hex}" Foreground="#555" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="9" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Uw091Hex}" Foreground="#555" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="9" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding LastServoCmd}" Foreground="#FF9800" FontSize="9"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </Border>

                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="2" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                        <StackPanel>
                            <!-- 서보 파라미터 값 표시 -->
                            <Border Margin="2,2,2,0" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                    BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                                <StackPanel>
                                    <TextBlock Text="서보 파라미터/상태값" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="11"
                                               Foreground="#DCDCAA" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                                    <UniformGrid Columns="2" Rows="4">
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="목표 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="목표 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (raw)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="조그 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding JogVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
                                            <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#F44747"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </UniformGrid>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Border>

                            <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 목록 -->
                            <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding ServoSystemWords}">
                                <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                    <DataTemplate>
                                        <Border Margin="2,2,2,0" Padding="4" Background="#252526"
                                                BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                                            <StackPanel>
                                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,2">
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                               Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Direction}" Foreground="#C586C0" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="] [" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                               FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
                                                </StackPanel>
                                                <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0"
                                                         IsReadOnly="False"
                                                         RowStyle="{StaticResource ServoRowStyle}">
                                                    <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                        <!-- SET 버튼: WRITE 방향일 때만 표시 -->
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="SET" Width="38">
                                                            <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                                <DataTemplate>
                                                                    <Button Click="BtnServoToggle_Click"
                                                                            Tag="{Binding}"
                                                                            CommandParameter="{Binding DataContext, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=DataGrid}}"
                                                                            Height="18" Width="32"
                                                                            FontSize="9" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                                            BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand"
                                                                            Focusable="False"
                                                                            Visibility="{Binding DataContext.IsWritable, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=DataGrid}, Converter={StaticResource BoolToVis}}">
                                                                        <Button.Style>
                                                                            <Style TargetType="Button">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Content" Value="OFF"/>
                                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#444"/>
                                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                                                <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                    <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                        <Setter Property="Content" Value="ON"/>
                                                                                        <Setter Property="Background" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                                                                                    </DataTrigger>
                                                                                </Style.Triggers>
                                                                            </Style>
                                                                        </Button.Style>
                                                                    </Button>
                                                                </DataTemplate>
                                                            </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="20">
                                                            <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                                <DataTemplate>
                                                                    <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10">
                                                                        <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                            <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                                <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                    <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                                    </DataTrigger>
                                                                                </Style.Triggers>
                                                                            </Style>
                                                                        </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse>
                                                                </DataTemplate>
                                                            </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="30"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="80"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                                           Width="*" IsReadOnly="False">
                                                            <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                                <Style TargetType="TextBox">
                                                                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
                                                                </Style>
                                                            </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="30"
                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    </DataGrid.Columns>
                                                </DataGrid>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                        </Border>
                                    </DataTemplate>
                                </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </ScrollViewer>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
